original_query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'burnished%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1996-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1996-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'GERMANY' order by s_name;
rewritten_query:
WITH part_supp_agg AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, l_suppkey, 0.5 * SUM(l_quantity) AS half_total_quantity
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1996-01-01'
      AND l_shipdate < DATE '1997-01-01'
    GROUP BY l_partkey, l_suppkey
),
burnished_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey
    FROM part
    WHERE p_name LIKE 'burnished%'
),
qualified_suppliers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ps_suppkey
    FROM partsupp
    JOIN burnished_parts ON partsupp.ps_partkey = burnished_parts.p_partkey
    JOIN part_supp_agg 
        ON partsupp.ps_partkey = part_supp_agg.l_partkey 
        AND partsupp.ps_suppkey = part_supp_agg.l_suppkey
    WHERE ps_availqty > part_supp_agg.half_total_quantity
)
SELECT s_name, s_address
FROM supplier
JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey AND nation.n_name = 'GERMANY'
WHERE supplier.s_suppkey IN (SELECT ps_suppkey FROM qualified_suppliers)
ORDER BY s_name;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replaced correlated subquery with a pre-computed aggregate CTE (part_supp_agg) to avoid scanning lineitem table repeatedly
Created a CTE for burnished parts to avoid repeating the part table filter
Used explicit JOIN syntax instead of comma-separated tables in the FROM clause
Simplified date calculation by using a fixed date '1997-01-01' instead of date '1996-01-01' + interval '1' year
Created a qualified_suppliers CTE to precompute the list of suppliers that meet all conditions
